info.description: OpenAPI contract for the Scratch AI teaching server.
info.title: Scratch AI Server API

get.description: Read aggregated teacher/student account counts for the current administrator.
List all managed student accounts for the current administrator.

post.description: Create a managed student account for the specified teacher.
Disable one managed student account.
Enable one managed student account.
Replace one managed student account password.

get.description: List all teacher/admin accounts for the current administrator.

post.description: Create a managed teacher account with an initial password.
Disable one managed teacher account.
Enable one managed teacher account.
Replace one managed teacher account password.

get.description: List the assignments currently published and assigned to the authenticated student.
Read the assignment detail plus latest progress and hint summaries for the authenticated student.

post.description: Generate the next hint from assignment analysis plus the student's latest reported progress.
Upload the latest structured Scratch progress snapshot for one assigned assignment.
Authenticate a student from the desktop client and return a bearer token.
Invalidate the current student bearer token immediately.

get.description: Read the current authenticated student session details.
List all assignments created by the current teacher.

post.description: Create an assignment by uploading a reference Scratch project and queue analysis.

get.description: Read assignment metadata, analysis summary, and assigned students for the current teacher.
Read the parsed SB3 analysis for a teacher assignment.

post.description: Archive an existing assignment so students no longer see it in active lists.
Bind one or more existing students to an assignment before publishing it.
Publish an analyzed assignment so students can access it.

get.description: Read the latest reported progress and hint state for all students assigned to one assignment.
Read the latest progress and hint state for every assignment assigned to one student.
get.summary: Get teacher view of one student's assignment history

post.description: Authenticate a teacher and return a bearer token for teacher APIs.
Invalidate the current teacher bearer token immediately.

get.description: Read the current authenticated teacher session details.

post.description: Create a teacher session and return a bearer token for teacher APIs.

get.description: List students for the current teacher.

post.description: Create a single student for the current teacher, returning the same shape as batch creation.
Create multiple students for the current teacher and report conflicts without failing the entire request.
Replace the initial or current password for one student owned by the current teacher.

get.description: Read a basic process health status for uptime checks.

hintText.example: 先把 Cat 的事件和移动积木串起来。

currentTarget.example: 让 Cat 角色移动起来

stepSummary.example: 已经把事件积木接上了
